name: dida365
title: Dida365
description: Control Dida365 tasks from Raycast on Windows.
author: ctacta621

commands.name: add-task
commands.title: Add Task
commands.subtitle: Dida365
commands.description: Create a Dida365 task with date, priority, notes, and reminder.

commands.name: tasks
commands.title: Tasks
commands.subtitle: Dida365
commands.description: View Dida365 tasks and mark them as complete.

commands.name: today-tasks
commands.title: Today Tasks
commands.subtitle: Dida365
commands.description: View and complete tasks due today.

commands.name: postpone-task
commands.title: Postpone Task
commands.subtitle: Dida365
commands.description: Move an existing task to another date.

commands.name: clipboard-to-task
commands.title: Clipboard to Task
commands.subtitle: Dida365
commands.description: Create a Dida365 task from clipboard text.

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: Dida365 API Token
preferences.description: Generate it in Dida365 Web -> Settings -> Account & Security -> API Token / Bearer Token.

preferences.name: timeZone
preferences.title: Time Zone
preferences.description: Used to create and compare due dates. Defaults to your system time zone; choose Asia/Shanghai for Dida365 China accounts.
